$comment: c151 D-LK1-4 PIE half: the PIE runtime witness. The pie target (ET_DYN + PT_INTERP + entry cluster) emits a directly-runnable position-independent executable; the linux leg execve's it at a randomized base and asserts exit 42. The const fn-ptr table (relro -> .data + R_X86_64_RELATIVE) makes the exit code depend on ld.so applying the RELATIVE fixups against the real load base — full-image ASLR correctness, not just header shape. Windows/macOS hosts compile-only (emission stays gated cross-host).
